channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: First Nation Chiefs Demand Public Inquiry Into Ontario Wildfire Response and Evacuation Gaps
item.description: First Nation leaders from northwestern Ontario are demanding a public inquiry into the provincial government’s handling of wildfires that have displaced over 2,400 residents. Gull Bay First Nation’s C...

item.title: Jon Ossoff Surges in Democratic Presidential Predictions, Signals Potential 2028 Bid
item.description: Sen. Jon Ossoff (D-GA) has experienced a significant rise in early 2028 Democratic presidential prediction markets, according to CNN's chief data analyst Harry Enten. Initially trailing behind Califor...

item.title: Ogun State Assembly Reverses Decision on Ex-Speaker's Embezzlement Charges
item.description: The Ogun State House of Assembly has reversed its earlier decision to indict former speaker Adeyemi Oludaisi for embezzlement, instead commuting his dismissal to resignation. The assembly found no evi...

item.title: Morocco Calls for Investigation After Man Dies in Police Custody in Italy
item.description: Morocco's foreign ministry has expressed concern over the death of a man during a police arrest in Bologna, Italy, and has called for a thorough investigation. The incident involved Abderrahim Fakir, ...

item.title: Koncept AI Academy Expands AI Training to Rwanda's Hospitality Sector
item.description: Tanzania-based Koncept AI Academy has expanded its regional footprint by conducting a high-level executive masterclass in Rwanda's hospitality sector, focusing on AI applications to improve business p...

item.title: PNP to Deploy Over 20,000 Officers for SONA Security
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has announced plans to deploy over 20,000 officers to ensure security during the State of the Nation Address (SONA) on July 23, 2026. PNP Chief Melencio Nartatez J...

item.title: Ola Aina Denies Arsenal Move, Sets Five-Goal Target for New Season
item.description: Nottingham Forest defender Ola Aina has dismissed rumors linking him to Arsenal, joking he's 'too old' for a move to North London. The 29-year-old Nigerian international, who joined Forest from Torino...

item.title: Philippine Peso Hits Record Low Against Dollar
item.description: The Philippine peso continued its downward trend, reaching its weakest level against the US dollar in recent history. According to ABS-CBN News, the currency depreciation has raised concerns among eco...

item.title: Kenyan beauty influencer dies after cosmetic surgery complications
item.description: Adriana García, a 30-year-old Mexican fashion influencer with over 47,000 TikTok followers, died following complications from a cosmetic procedure. Based in Culiacán, Mexico, she was known for her vib...

item.title: Samsung Unveils Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Fold8, and Flip8 Foldables for Enhanced Productivity and Creativity
item.description: Samsung has launched its latest Galaxy Z series foldable smartphones, featuring the Fold8 Ultra, Fold8, and Flip8 models. These devices are designed to cater to diverse user needs through advanced AI ...

item.title: Driver taken to hospital after car collision with police unit on Hindmarsh Drive
item.description: A car collided with a police vehicle on the Hindmarsh Drive off-ramp near Tuggeranong Parkway in south Canberra, resulting in one person being hospitalized for mandatory testing. The incident occurred...

item.title: Manitoba partially reimburses retiree for out-of-country spinal surgery after initial rejections
item.description: Tom Molinski, a 69-year-old Manitoba retiree, received partial reimbursement of nearly $24,000 from Manitoba Health for an out-of-province spinal fusion surgery he underwent in Germany in 2024. The pr...

item.title: Disney Experiences Auction Catalog Reveals Rare Collectibles and Limited-Edition Merchandise
item.description: The Disney Experiences Auction, set to debut at D23: The Ultimate Disney Fan Event in 2026, has released a product preview catalog featuring exclusive items for sale. The catalog includes the 'Bug-Eye...

item.title: Bulldog Attack on Freddy Brazier's Nan Sparks Legal Action After Neighbours Warned Authorities
item.description: Freddy Brazier's nan, Jackiey Budden, suffered a severe attack from his bulldog, which occurred days after neighbours had already alerted the police. The incident highlights concerns about animal cont...

item.title: Football Club Struggles with Travelers' Occupation of Pitch and Park
item.description: Travellers have occupied a football club's pitch and nearby park with over 20 vehicles after the local council left the gates unlocked. Albion Rovers FC in Newport, Wales, faced significant disruption...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Shilling Bond in London to Boost Financial Markets
item.description: The Tanzanian government, through its Finance Minister, has taken a significant step in strengthening its financial markets by launching the Tanzania Shilling bond in London. This initiative aims to a...

item.title: UK Food Prices Drop, But Inflation Risks Rise as Energy Costs Increase
item.description: Food prices in the UK have fallen at their slowest rate in nearly two years, with staples like margarine and sugar seeing price declines due to supermarket competition and summer sales. However, overa...

item.title: Southern California Faces Severe Heatwave as Temperatures Rise
item.description: A prolonged heatwave is gripping Southern California, with temperatures reaching record highs and posing significant risks to public health, infrastructure, and ecosystems. The National Weather Servic...

item.title: Junior Springboks Doctor Saves Passenger's Life Mid-Flight
item.description: Dr. Clement Plaatjies, the team doctor of the Junior Springboks, recently demonstrated exceptional professionalism by saving a passenger's life during a flight from Johannesburg to Cape Town. The inci...

item.title: Post-Tariff Expiry: India-US Trade Outlook and Potential Tariff Changes
item.description: The 10% tariff imposed by the Donald Trump administration on most Indian goods to the US, which has been in effect since February 2026, is set to expire on July 24. This temporary measure was a stop-g...
